title: Rønnestad Fast-Start 5 × 5
description: Accelerated VO2max response via hard-start pacing
purpose: Accelerated VO2max response via hard-start pacing

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/10. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 120% for 1:30. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: After this recovery, you have 3min at 105%. One interval at a time. Focus here first.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 1:30.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 120% for 1:30. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 16 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/5. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 105% at 90-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/5. 3:30 at 105%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/5.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/5. 105% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 3 of 10.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/10. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/10. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 120% for 1:30. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 35% complete. Block 2/5. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2: 3:30 at 105%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 2/5. 105% for 3:30. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 35% into session. Seated at 95-100 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 5:00. Then 40min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 40% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 30 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 46% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 46% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 46% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. 120% for 1:30. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 48% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 35 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 36 minutes in. 105% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 48% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 4 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 48% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 48% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 15min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 53% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 7/10. 45 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60% through session. Rep 7/10. You've done 15min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 60% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 7/10. You've accumulated 15min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 46 minutes of threshold work done. Block 4/5. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 4/5. 62% complete. Hold 105% steady. 25 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% complete. Block 4/5. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. 2 blocks left. Only. ONLY. *laughs maniacally*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 4/5. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% done. 0 intervals left. 20 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 20 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 55 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 9/10. 1:30 at 120%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 55 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 73% complete. Rep 9/10. Fatigue is real — hold form. 120%, 90-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 3:30 at 105%. Then 15min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 3:30 at 105%. Then 15min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 15min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 3:30 at 105%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 105% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 60 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 80% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 80% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 86% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 65 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
